libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, environment variable, or system property setup is indicated. Prefer in-memory XML/protocol tests and simple servlet request/response stubs; do not require a live Jackrabbit repository or WebDAV server for baseline coverage.

deterministic_setup.reason:
The resolved jackrabbit-webdav 2.0-beta4 POM marks servlet-api as provided, while the artifact contains public APIs and implementation classes importing javax.servlet/javax.servlet.http, such as AbstractWebdavServlet, WebdavRequestImpl, InputContextImpl, OutputContextImpl, and header parsers. input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Use javax.servlet, not jakarta.servlet, because this old Jackrabbit release uses the pre-Jakarta API.
The native-image runtime failure may still require metadata or test expectation changes; this setup only addresses compile/runtime classpath access to provided servlet APIs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jackrabbit-webdav exposes servlet-backed request/response/server APIs but declares javax.servlet:servlet-api as a provided dependency, so generated tests need an explicit test dependency to compile and cover those classes.
